supported_devices: EC fans, AC fans, LED/HID lights with 0-10V or 1-10V dimming, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters, CO2 valves, CO2 generators, irrigation pumps, heating mats
port_types: Schuko outlet (x4), RJ45 (x8), USB-A, 0-10V output, DC 12-24V output
compatible_ec_fans: EC fans with GrowControl RJ45 protocol
compatible_lights: LED/HID fixtures with 0-10V or 1-10V dimming input; any fixture via AC outlet
compatible_sensors: GrowControl CarbSense (CO2), PresSense (negative pressure), IRCube (leaf temperature), RootSense
compatible_co2_equipment: CO2 valves, CO2 generators (via AC outlet)
supported_manufacturer_series: CarbSense, PresSense, IRCube, RootSense, FanBase EC+
recommended_use_note: Premium multi-function controller with WiFi; VPD control, multi-sensor support, and inrush current protection for LED on socket 4 (up to 2300W)
uvp_notes: Manufacturer page shows 'not available for sale' as of June 2026; listed at retailers (e.g. Growmart at EUR 1149)
notes: 8 RJ45 ports for EC fans, sensors, and 0-10V dimming control; socket 4 has inrush current limiter and 2-pole shutdown for LED up to 2300W on separate 10A supply; sockets 1-3 share 7A supply (1600VA combined max); web interface via connect.growcontrol.de; multi-sensor support (multiple sensors of same type); WiFi 2.4GHz IEEE 802.11b/g/n; email alerts; Made in Germany; IP42 protection class I
